Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Defendants Grove Street To Provide Further Responses To Special Interrogatories; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Anna Lee's Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Further Responses To Special Interrogatories is granted as it seeks a further response to Number 63. Defendant is ordered to provide the last known address and phone numbers for former employees within 10 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Anna Lee's Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is denied as to Document Request Numbers 7 and 8. The motion is granted as to Document Request Numbers 9-17. Documents shall be produced within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
